# Matthew Tse

> Personal website of Matthew Tse — engineering leader, builder, and maker. Currently leading the Client Engagement engineering team at Headway.

Matthew Tse is a software engineering leader at Headway, where he leads the Client Engagement (Clenge) team. Previously worked at Lyft (location geocode snapping, ~$1M+ yearly margin impact) and Credit Karma (credit score refresh infra for 100M+ members, Identity Monitoring, Credit Lock, and started the Canadian internship program). University of Waterloo ECE graduate, won the GM Innovation Award for ModVR.

## Current Projects

- Building at Headway: Leading the Client Engagement team and an AI agent project
- Crunchtime: Fitness coordination app among friends
- Fermentation Sleeve: 3D-printed fermentation jar sleeves

## Past Work

- Lyft: Led location geocode snapping at Lyft Business concierge
- Credit Karma: Led credit score refresh infra revamp, built Identity Monitoring and Credit Lock
- The Coterie: Built server-driven UI for iOS app
- pupdash: Dashboard for tracking puppy routines
- Blackjack GTO: Optimal blackjack play guide
- Memoryworthy: Daily journaling app inspired by Storyworthy

## Interests

Ceramics, AI agents, fermentation, snowboarding, 3D printing, weightlifting, kombucha, digital art, food science, badminton, poker, fine dining, street food, foraging, cantonese soups
